title: KernelSkill
description: Metadata for a single skill in the kernel-skills registry. Lives next to SKILL.md. Vendored from KrxGu/kernel-skills for registry compatibility.

category.description: Top-level category. Must match the parent folder under skills/.

summary.description: One-sentence description of what the skill helps the agent do.

tags.description: Free-form tags for search and filtering.

hardware.description: Hardware targets the skill is intended for.

languages.description: Languages or DSLs relevant to the skill (e.g. cuda, cpp, triton, python).

requires.description: Skill ids this skill builds on.

version.description: Semantic version of the skill itself, independent of package version.

entry.description: Path to the skill's SKILL.md, relative to the package root.
